extension.description: Orion v3.2.1 - Complete media addon with multiple torrent scrapers (Torrentio, MediaFusion, Jackettio, Orionoid), Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid, TorBox, Trakt integration with scrobbling, watchlists and liked lists, ResolveURL support, watch history, favorites, Kids Zone, and auto-play next episode.
extension.news: [3.2.1] Added [CACHED] tags - batch cache checking across all debrid providers (RD, PM, AD, TB). Cached sources sorted to top with green tags. Source summary line shows cached/total count.
